title: PiglinSafety
description: make Piglins & Piglin Brutes immune to fire.
body:
This is a very simple mod, it makes the fireImmune property of PiglinEntity & PiglinBruteEntity & Hoglin true.

In that case, Piglins & Piglin Brutes &Hoglins won't be hurt by lava/fire.

Configurable.

[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
